text_template: Support for Today, Explained comes from Starbucks. Perhaps you're clocking out today with TGIF on your lips. You can keep the good vibes going with an energy boost with Starbucks' new energy refreshers. Their handcrafted energy refreshers can be the perfect thing to round out your Friday afternoon with flavors such as strawberry acai or even mango dragon fruit. Try the all new energy refreshers at Starbucks.
